name: intent-extraction
description: User intent extraction from webpage description

request.body:
{"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You extract user intent from webpage descriptions. Be concise."},{"role":"user","content":"The user wants to monitor this page:
URL: https://example.com/events
Content: A list of upcoming community events with dates, titles, and locations.

What does the user want to track? Respond in one sentence."}],"model":"ministral-3:3b"}

response.body: {"id":"chatcmpl-407","object":"chat.completion","created":1766830945,"model":"ministral-3:3b","system_fingerprint":"fp_ollama","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"The user wants to **monitor upcoming community event details (title, date, location)** on this page for scheduling or updates."},"finish_reason":"stop"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":68,"completion_tokens":26,"total_tokens":94}}
response.content: The user wants to **monitor upcoming community event details (title, date, location)** on this page for scheduling or updates.
